name: testAddMerchantAcquirer
description: Verify the active and inactive merchant acquirers can be added

statusMessage: New Merchant acquirer with status 'Inactive' not found. expected [true] but found [false]

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0710.115501.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Gateway' tab
Select '0710.115501 company 112172' company using filter
Select 'Merchant 1 for C112172' business unit using filter
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' in dropdown
Close alert message
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0710.115501 acquirer for gateway' in dropdown
Close alert message
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Active status
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Inactive status
